title: oenothera mollissima var. longiflora
intro: Oenothera mollissima var. longiflora, also known as Evening Primrose, is a perennial plant species native to North America. Its roots and flowers have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Oenothera mollissima var. longiflora include reducing symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats, as well as alleviating conditions like eczema, rheumatism, and anxiety. Oenothera mollissima var. longiflora can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or oil, often used in herbal supplements and topical applications.
